question: Can a fixed monthly 90-day ETH/BTC relative-momentum rule with 25% long and 25% short USD-M legs deliver stable low-common-beta profitability after actual funding and realistic costs?
intended_claim: Demo consideration using the two existing BTCUSDT-PERP and ETHUSDT-PERP instruments only after all sequential gates
known_exposure: BTC and ETH histories have been viewed by other rules, and 90-day spot top-1 momentum failed. This exact perpetual long-short relative rule has not been run. Evidence is a new fixed mechanism with thirteen-trial correction and sequential time gates, not virgin-data discovery.

mechanism_choice.selected: relative momentum of the ETH/BTC ratio
mechanism_choice.reason: Positive crypto pairs research requires dynamic cointegration, pair selection and quote-level execution; strong crypto time-series momentum has a simpler mature prior. The study will not run both and choose the winner.

fixed_candidate.signal: at each first UTC day of month, compare prior-day ETH/BTC close ratio with the ratio 90 days earlier
fixed_candidate.action_time: same first UTC day open using only prior closes

benchmarks: static long ETH 25% and short BTC 25%
static long BTC 25% and short ETH 25%
long BTC 25% and long ETH 25% common-beta diagnostic

selection_bias.columns: six BTC daily Donchian, three BTC carry-conditioned, one BTC Spot transfer, one ETH transfer, one BTC 8h transfer, one BTC/ETH relative-momentum candidate

development_gate: base and stress total returns positive
at least two of 2021/2022/2023 positive and worst year at least -5%
base Sharpe and Calmar both exceed both static relative directions
evaluation_gate: base and stress total returns positive
base Sharpe and Calmar both exceed both static relative directions
confirmation_gate: base and stress total returns non-negative
evaluation plus confirmation base and stress CAGR above 4%
allowed_fixes_after_checkpoint: Only code, serialization, data-integrity or documentation corrections that preserve the fixed rule, periods, costs, related-trial accounting and gates. Record fixes and refresh code hash before opening another phase.
opening_rule: Run development only. Evaluation requires evaluation_authorized=true; confirmation requires confirmation_authorized=true.
